title: Identify Start and End in a Complex Range

content.problemStatement:
Fill in the missing parts of the program that uses a for loop to print page numbers from 21 to 25, using start and end variables. You need to complete both the variable initialization and the for loop header.

----

**Expected output:**
```default
Page: 21
Page: 22
Page: 23
Page: 24
Page: 25
```
